case.title: ARMORED CARRIER CORP. v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: ARMORED CARRIER CORP. v. UNITED STATES, 386 U.S. 778 (1967)
opinion.h4: ARMORED CARRIER CORP. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 1011. Decided May 8, 1967.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Marshall, Assistant Attorney General Turner, Howard E. Shapiro, Robert W. Ginnane and Nahum Litt for the United States et al., and Seymour D. Lewis for B. D.C. Corp., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
